item.title: Uncovering The Thermal Expansion In High-Entropy Ceramics By Machine Learning
item.description:

Source: Journal of Materiomics, Volume 12, Issue 3

item.title: An Interpretable Machine Learning Framework For Predicting Curie Temperature Of Lead-Based Piezoelectric Ceramics

item.title: Enhanced Ion Conductivity And Stability Against Li Metal In Dy<sup>3+</sup>-Doped Li<sub>2</sub>ZrCl<sub>6</sub> Electrolytes For High-Performance All-Solid-State Batteries
